reason: Verify final changes preserve global authority chain and Stage 2 scope.
Verify selected-body realization owner registry, MAcc owner-family boundary, and provider fail-closed behavior.
Verify common EmitC remains neutral and routes are provider-built.

Verify tests attach to production compiler behavior and no runtime claim is made without ssh rvv evidence.

Verify no high-level/core compute boundary drift was introduced.
Verify implementation satisfies the task acceptance criteria and out-of-scope limits.
